title: coleus mitis
intro: Coleus mitis, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus barbatus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus mitis include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antacid and a digestive aid. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
